evaluators.name: Cheapest 300k/500 Sailboat Plan with Annual Billing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies the user created a quote for a 22 ft sailboat in 98109 ~35k value, selected a 300k liability / $500 deductible plan, chose the cheapest such plan available online, and set annual billing.

evaluators.name: Mid-Priced Motorboat Plan with Towing & Personal Effects Under $20 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a recreational motorboat quote in 98109, selected the mid-priced 300k/1000 plan, enabled towing and at least $1,000 personal effects coverage, and kept optional coverage cost under $20/month.

evaluators.name: Login, Update Mailing Address, and View ID Card Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user logged in as demo_user, updated the mailing address on the active 20 ft motorboat policy in 98109 to 123 Marina Way, Seattle, WA 98109, and viewed the current digital ID card for that policy.

evaluators.name: File and Submit Correct Boat Claim Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that a submitted boat insurance claim exists for the active 20 ft motorboat policy in 98109 with the specified Lake Union collision details, $3,200 damage, no injuries, no police report, and the correct owner contact info.

evaluators.name: Nearest Agent Consultation Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user sent a consultation request to a local agent near 98109 (preferably the nearest agent) with a message about boat insurance for a 22 ft sailboat in ZIP 98109, using the specified name and email.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Policy Type with Towing & Uninsured Boater and 500k+ Liability Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user started a quote for the least expensive policy type that includes both on-water towing and uninsured boater coverage, with a liability limit of at least $500,000 for a $35,000 boat in ZIP 98109, and progressed through plan selection.

evaluators.name: Discounts Quote with Safety + Multi-Policy and Monthly Billing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a quote (likely from the discounts section) for a $25,000 boat in ZIP 98109, applied both the Boating Safety Course and Multi-Policy discounts, chose monthly billing, and saved it with the label 'Safety + Multi-Policy Discounts'.

evaluators.name: Max-1 Boat Length Motorboat Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user started a quote for a motorboat in ZIP 98109 valued at $25,000 with boat length exactly 1 foot less than the maximum online-quote length derived from the Help/FAQ articles, and reached valid boat details (so they could proceed to coverage options).
